name: Media Contact Sync
summary: Keeps ONE shared media-contact list current and clean, automatically. Reads affiliate managers' own Gmail (read-only), harvests contacts from out-of-office replies + signatures, dedups against the shared list, and adds new people or fills gaps on existing ones -- never duplicates, never overwrites.
description: A multi-tenant contact-hygiene tool for affiliate/PR/media teams. Several managers each connect their OWN Gmail read-only; the tool mines new + updated contacts (out-of-office backup names, email signatures; thread participants in v2), NORMALIZES them, and DEDUPS against one shared media list (an Airtable base). It either adds a net-new row or fills the gaps on an existing contact -- and flags any uncertain match for a human. Runs daily + on-demand. Merge policy (locked): same email = same person (fill blanks, never duplicate); same name at the same publisher with a missing/different email = probably same person (fill the gap but flag it); GOLDEN RULE = only ADD or FILL BLANKS, never overwrite. The engine (extract -> normalize -> dedup) is pure + tested; Gmail and Airtable are thin adapters around it. Built as a packageable extension so any agency installs it, connects its managers, and points it at its own base.

manager_accounts.label: The Google accounts (managers) whose Gmail to harvest, read-only

airtable_base.label: The Airtable base ID that holds the shared master contact list

schedule.label: How often to run (daily | hourly | manual)
